channel.title: Jamf — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Jamf (jamf).

item.title: CVE-2026-1290 · 5.3 MEDIUM — [PI141230] Fixed A broken access control issue.
item.description: Authentication Bypass by Primary Weakness vulnerability in Jamf Jamf Pro allows unspecified impact.This issue affects Jamf Pro: from 11.20 through 11.24.

item.title: CVE-2024-10183 · 5.2 MEDIUM — Arbitrary File Write Vulnerability in Jamf Remote Assist Leading to Privilege Escalation
item.description: A vulnerability in Jamf Pro's Jamf Remote Assist tool allows a local, non-privileged user to escalate their privileges to root on MacOS systems.

item.title: CVE-2024-4395 · 7.8 HIGH — Lack of Client Validation in Jamf Compliance Editor's Helper Service May Result in Privilege Escalation
item.description: The XPC service within the audit functionality of Jamf Compliance Editor before version 1.3.1 on macOS can lead to local privilege escalation.
